eyebrow: Own your audio · share it your way

hero.paragraph: A hybrid, self-hosted music ecosystem. Absolute ownership of your library, with the connected, social streaming experience - in bit-perfect fidelity.

liveRooms.body: Synchronized listening parties with chat, votes, and turn-taking DJs. You hear your own copy when you own it; your library relays the rest.
liveRooms.title: Live listening rooms

ownIt.body: Keep your library at home on a NAS or Pi, or run it on a cloud server - either way the music is yours. It streams bit-perfect (FLAC, ALAC, WAV, Dolby Atmos) straight to your devices, and Chordia never stores or routes your audio.
ownIt.title: Own it, host it anywhere

selectiveSharing.body: Organize music into separate libraries - "Hi-Fi Archive", "Family Collection" - and share each one with exactly the friends you choose.
selectiveSharing.title: Selective sharing

wrapped.body: Every play is scrobbled to your global account and kept forever - weekly, monthly, and yearly insights that survive any server move.
wrapped.title: Lifetime Wrapped
